# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

require 'sendgrid-ruby'

class SendGridMailer < ApplicationMailer
  include SendGrid

  default from: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_DEFAULT_FROM', 'noreply@example.com')

  def initialize
    super
    @sendgrid_api_key = ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_API_KEY', nil)
  end

  def welcome_email(user)
    @user = user
    @url = root_url

    if use_sendgrid?
      send_via_sendgrid(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: 'Welcome to Our Application',
        template_id: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_WELCOME_TEMPLATE_ID', nil),
        dynamic_template_data: {
          first_name: @user.first_name,
          url: @url
        }
      )
    else
      mail(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: 'Welcome to Our Application',
        template_path: 'send_grid_mailer',
        template_name: 'welcome_email'
      )
    end
  end

  def password_reset_email(user, reset_token)
    @user = user
    @reset_token = reset_token
    @reset_url = edit_password_reset_url(reset_token)

    if use_sendgrid?
      send_via_sendgrid(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: 'Password Reset Instructions',
        template_id: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_PASSWORD_RESET_TEMPLATE_ID', nil),
        dynamic_template_data: {
          first_name: @user.first_name,
          reset_url: @reset_url
        }
      )
    else
      mail(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: 'Password Reset Instructions',
        template_path: 'send_grid_mailer',
        template_name: 'password_reset_email'
      )
    end
  end

  def notification_email(user, message, options = {})
    @user = user
    @message = message
    @subject = options.fetch(:subject, 'Notification')

    if use_sendgrid?
      send_via_sendgrid(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: @subject,
        html_content: render_to_string(
          template: 'send_grid_mailer/notification_email',
          layout: 'mailer'
        ),
        plain_content: render_to_string(
          template: 'send_grid_mailer/notification_email',
          layout: 'mailer',
          formats: [:text]
        ),
        categories: options.fetch(:categories, ['notification']),
        custom_args: options.fetch(:custom_args, {})
      )
    else
      mail(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: @subject,
        template_path: 'send_grid_mailer',
        template_name: 'notification_email'
      )
    end
  end

  def bulk_email(recipients, subject, body, options = {})
    if use_sendgrid?
      send_bulk_via_sendgrid(
        recipients: recipients,
        subject: subject,
        html_content: body,
        categories: options.fetch(:categories, ['bulk']),
        send_at: options.fetch(:send_at, nil),
        batch_id: options.fetch(:batch_id, nil)
      )
    else
      recipients.each do |recipient|
        @body = body
        mail(
          to: recipient[:email],
          subject: subject,
          template_path: 'send_grid_mailer',
          template_name: 'bulk_email'
        ).deliver_now
      end
    end
  end

  private

  def use_sendgrid?
    @sendgrid_api_key.present? && !Rails.env.test?
  end

  def sendgrid_client
    @sendgrid_client ||= SendGrid::API.new(api_key: @sendgrid_api_key)
  end

  def send_via_sendgrid(params)
    mail_object = SendGrid::Mail.new
    mail_object.from = SendGrid::Email.new(
      email: default_params[:from],
      name: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_FROM_NAME', 'Application')
    )

    personalization = SendGrid::Personalization.new
    personalization.add_to(SendGrid::Email.new(email: params[:to]))
    personalization.subject = params[:subject]

    if params[:dynamic_template_data].present?
      params[:dynamic_template_data].each do |key, value|
        personalization.add_dynamic_template_data(key.to_s => value)
      end
    end

    mail_object.add_personalization(personalization)

    if params[:template_id].present?
      mail_object.template_id = params[:template_id]
    else
      if params[:html_content].present?
        mail_object.add_content(
          SendGrid::Content.new(type: 'text/html', value: params[:html_content])
        )
      end

      if params[:plain_content].present?
        mail_object.add_content(
          SendGrid::Content.new(type: 'text/plain', value: params[:plain_content])
        )
      end
    end

    if params[:categories].present?
      params[:categories].each do |category|
        mail_object.add_category(SendGrid::Category.new(name: category))
      end
    end

    if params[:custom_args].present?
      params[:custom_args].each do |key, value|
        personalization.add_custom_arg(SendGrid::CustomArg.new(key: key.to_s, value: value.to_s))
      end
    end

    tracking_settings = SendGrid::TrackingSettings.new
    click_tracking = SendGrid::ClickTracking.new
    click_tracking.enable = true
    click_tracking.enable_text = false
    tracking_settings.click_tracking = click_tracking

    open_tracking = SendGrid::OpenTracking.new
    open_tracking.enable = true
    tracking_settings.open_tracking = open_tracking

    mail_object.tracking_settings = tracking_settings

    deliver_sendgrid_mail(mail_object)
  end

  def send_bulk_via_sendgrid(params)
    mail_object = SendGrid::Mail.new
    mail_object.from = SendGrid::Email.new(
      email: default_params[:from],
      name: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_FROM_NAME', 'Application')
    )

    params[:recipients].each do |recipient|
      personalization = SendGrid::Personalization.new
      personalization.add_to(SendGrid::Email.new(email: recipient[:email], name: recipient[:name]))
      personalization.subject = params[:subject]

      if recipient[:substitutions].present?
        recipient[:substitutions].each do |key, value|
          personalization.add_dynamic_template_data(key.to_s => value)
        end
      end

      mail_object.add_personalization(personalization)
    end

    if params[:html_content].present?
      mail_object.add_content(
        SendGrid::Content.new(type: 'text/html', value: params[:html_content])
      )
    end

    if params[:categories].present?
      params[:categories].each do |category|
        mail_object.add_category(SendGrid::Category.new(name: category))
      end
    end

    if params[:send_at].present?
      mail_object.send_at = params[:send_at].to_i
    end

    if params[:batch_id].present?
      mail_object.batch_id = params[:batch_id]
    end

    deliver_sendgrid_mail(mail_object)
  end

  def deliver_sendgrid_mail(mail_object)
    response = sendgrid_client.client.mail._('send').post(request_body: mail_object.to_json)

    unless response.status_code.to_i.between?(200, 299)
      error_body = begin
        JSON.parse(response.body)
      rescue JSON::ParserError
        response.body
      end

      Rails.logger.error(
        "[SendGridMailer] Delivery failed - Status: #{response.status_code}, " \
        "Body: #{error_body}, Headers: #{response.headers}"
      )

      raise SendGridDeliveryError.new(
        "SendGrid delivery failed with status #{response.status_code}: #{error_body}",
        status_code: response.status_code,
        body: error_body
      )
    end

    Rails.logger.info(
      "[SendGridMailer] Email delivered successfully - Status: #{response.status_code}"
    )

    response
  rescue StandardError => e
    raise if e.is_a?(SendGridDeliveryError)

    Rails.logger.error("[SendGridMailer] Unexpected error: #{e.message}")
    raise SendGridDeliveryError.new(
      "SendGrid delivery encountered an unexpected error: #{e.message}",
      original_error: e
    )
  end

  class SendGridDeliveryError < StandardError
    attr_reader :status_code, :body, :original_error

    def initialize(message, status_code: nil, body: nil, original_error: nil)
      @status_code = status_code
      @body = body
      @original_error = original_error
      super(message)
    end
  end
end
